description_long: This is a single-story log cabin with a wide, gently sloped gable roof made of dark brown material, likely metal or shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontally stacked logs, giving it a rustic and traditional appearance. The front facade features a covered porch with wooden railings, providing a welcoming entryway and outdoor seating area. Windows are symmetrically arranged along the longer sides, with multiple rectangular panes allowing natural light inside. The cabin sits on a circular patch of green terrain, simulating a grassy yard or park setting. The overall structure is robust and solid, suitable for residential or recreational use in a suburban or park environment.
description: A rustic log cabin with a wide gable roof, covered front porch, and symmetrically arranged windows, set on a grassy circular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with wooden railings and the main entrance, along with several windows on the facade.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the solid log wall with no visible windows or doors, and the full expanse of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the long side of the cabin with multiple symmetrically arranged windows and the log construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a small covered area under the roof overhang, with visible support beams and no windows or doors.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with wide overhangs, constructed from dark material, likely metal or shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rectangular windows symmetrically arranged along the longer sides of the cabin, evenly spaced and of similar size
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade, integrated into the covered porch area
